title: Shopping trips
description: An aisle-organized, cost-estimated shopping run for a plan's shopping list. The optimizer groups the gap lines by grocery aisle and estimates the total cost.

planId.description: the plan whose shopping list this trip organizes

store.description: which store the trip is for, if named

estimatedCost.description: estimated total cost of the trip (sum of gap quantities × ingredient costPerUnit)

organized.description: the aisle-grouped lines: array of { aisle, lines:[{ ingredient, unit, quantity, estCost }] }

plan.description: the week this trip shops for
